# Classification Matrix

## Orchestration Example

Call Skill(/pasture:worker) to begin.

## Decision Example

AskUserQuestion(questions: [...]) opens the survey.

## Task Effect Example

Skill(/pasture:task-effect-example) stands in for a future bd invocation pattern.

## Process Effect Example

Skill(/pasture:process-effect-example) stands in for a future git invocation pattern.

## Verbatim Example

Skill(/pasture:verbatim-example) is kept exactly as historical documentation shows.

## Target Literal Example

Skill(/pasture:target-literal-example) is the harness-pinned literal form.

## Neutral False Positive Example

The word Skill(/pasture:neutral-example) is merely named here, not invoked.
